nasb.text: For this perfume might have been sold for over three hundred denarii, and the money given to the poor.” And they were scolding her.

esv.text: For this ointment could have been sold for more than three hundred denarii and given to the poor.” And they scolded her.

cnv.text: 這香膏可以賣三百多個銀幣，用來賙濟窮人。”他們就向她發怒。

ccb.text: 这瓶香膏可以卖三百多个银币来周济穷人。”他们就责备那女人。

csbs.text: 这香液本来可以卖三百多个银币，分给穷人。”他们就责备那女人。
